get.description: Returns data for the specified dataset with basic selection criteria. All data is returned synchronously in the HTTPS response stream.

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: Name of the group or category of the data. Setting this parameter returns only dataset(s) belonging to that group.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name of the data within the group. Setting this parameter with group returns one unique dataset. Setting this parameter without group can return one or more dataset(s) across group(s).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma delimited list of field names to retrieve. If null, then all fields returned.

parameters.name: sortFields
parameters.description: Comma delimited list of field names to sort by.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Record number to start with (inclusive). Default is 0. Range of records to be returned is offsetRecord plus limit. If offsetRecord is 0 and limit is 20, then records 0 to 19 are returned for a total of 20 records.

parameters.name: delimiter
parameters.description: Single character delimiter to use for text/plain Accept formats.

parameters.name: quoteValues
parameters.description: True or false if field values for text/plain should be in double quotes.

parameters.name: async
parameters.description: True or false for if this call should be done asynchronously

401.description: You are not authorized to view the resource

404.description: The resource you were trying to reach is not found

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Unique name of the data within the group. Setting this parameter with group returns one unique dataset. Setting this parameter without group can return one or more dataset(s) across group(s).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Comma delimited list of field names to retrieve. If null, then all fields returned.

parameters.name: delimiter
parameters.description: Single character delimiter to use for text/plain Accept formats.

parameters.name: quoteValues
parameters.description: True or false if field values for text/plain should be in double quotes.

businessObjectDefinitionName.description: The name of the Business Object Definition to which a Business Object Format is related

businessObjectFormatFileType.description: A File Type known to the system that describes the file type of data stored under a Business Object Format

businessObjectFormatUsage.description: The Usage of this Business Object Format - a string describing how this format is used. Often used as a label for the Business                   Object Format. Does not have to be unique in the system, the Usage string is frequently shared across formats for multiple Business Object                   Definitions

businessObjectFormatVersion.description: The numeric version of a Business Object Format. Each time a format is registered, the new version will be the previous version                   + 1

namespace.description: The Namespace to which a Business Object Format is related

partitions.description: Map of partition fields and values for the specific dataset.
Map of partition fields and values for the specific dataset.

async.description: True/false to run request in async mode.

delimiter.description: Character delimiter to use for text/plain Accept types. Default is comma.

fields.description: Comma delimited list of field names to retrieve. Default is all fields.

limit.description: Returned record limit. Populating this value will override 'size'.

offset.description: Record number to start with (inclusive). Populating this value will override 'page'

quoteValues.description: true or false if text/plain field values should be quoted. Default is true.

sortFields.description: List of fields to sort by.

description.description: Description of the data for this dataset.

entitlement.description: Denotes the entitlement required to view this dataset

group.description: Name of the group or category of the data. Setting this parameter returns only dataset(s) belonging to that group.

name.description: Unique name of the data within the group. Setting this parameter with group returns one unique dataset. Setting this parameter without group can return one or more dataset(s) across group(s).

securityLevel.description: Security level of the data for this dataset

supportedFormats.description: List of supported data formats. For each format listed, it is expected that the dataset will be able to convert in between them upon user request.

supportedMethods.description: The HTTP methods supported by this dataset.

supportsGetById.description: Denotes if this dataset supports getting a single record by primary id field.

supportsQuery.description: Denotes whether this dataset supports query parameters (limit/offset, filters, etc).

supportsRecordLimit.description: Denotes whether this dataset supports client specifying a record limit.

supportsRecordOffset.description: Denotes whether this dataset supports client specifying a record offset.

usage.description: Whether or not data is external or internal only.

nativeFormat.description: Holds native format information. If for example source is an XML file, then this value can be an XSD.
